_comment: Default-value reference for run_theoremC_oracle_hybrid.py (C6). Mirrors the C6Config dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §7.6. C6 makes the theorem-level definition of 'oracle hybrid' precise: oracle hybrid = direct optimization over the refined commutant class (NOT a learned projector). Compares three operator-level objects only — coarse, refined-commutant (= oracle hybrid), fully unconstrained singleton (= oracle ceiling). Architecture comparisons belong to §9.
